top_signals.title: Dollar Stalls as US-Iran Peace Hopes Boost Risk Sentiment
top_signals.summary: The dollar ended the week nearly unchanged as risk assets got a boost tied to optimism around progress in peace talks between the US and Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU and Mexico deepen long-term ties at a historic summit
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Mexico City, 22 May 2026 Today, the EU and Mexico have taken a major step forward in their partnership by signing the Modernised Global Agreement (MGA) and interim Trade Agreement (iTA). At the 8th EU-Mexico Summit in Mexico City, both sides agreed to deepen their political and economic cooperation at a time of growing global uncertainty.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Modernising money and markets − speech by Sarah Breeden
Reddit stock drops almost 6% after Meta launches standalone app for online forums
top_signals.summary: Reddit shares fell after Meta released a standalone app for Facebook Groups called Forum.
